acrobatics: Dodge, balance, and tumble through dangerous spaces. Dodge incoming attacks and leap across gaps with grace.
climb: Scale walls, cliffs, and surfaces using strength and technique. Catch yourself mid-fall if your luck holds.
deception: Lie convincingly. Hide the truth, create false impressions, and talk your way out of trouble.
endurance: Push your body past its limits. Survive harsh environments, hold your breath, and resist fatigue.
gatherInfo: Network, spy, and extract information from others. Learn secrets, track rumors, and uncover hidden knowledge.
initiative: React fastest when danger strikes. Determine who acts first in combat and surprise ambushes.
jump: Leap across distances and heights. Clear obstacles in a single bound or vault obstacles in combat.
knowledgeBureaucracy: Understand law, bureaucracy, and governmental systems. Navigate legal systems, forge documents, or exploit red tape.
knowledgeGalacticLore: Know the history and lore of the galaxy. Identify historical references, recall galactic events, and understand Star Wars history.
knowledgeLifeSciences: Understand biology, xenobiology, and life sciences. Identify creatures, understand anatomy, and diagnose biological conditions.
knowledgePhysicalSciences: Comprehend physics, chemistry, and physical laws. Understand how things work, calculate trajectories, and exploit physical properties.
knowledgeSocialSciences: Understand psychology, sociology, and behavior. Read people, understand cultures, and predict reactions.
knowledgeTactics: Master military strategy and tactical maneuvers. Assess battlefield situations, plan formations, and execute complex tactics.
knowledgeTechnology: Understand technology, engineering, and technical systems. Identify technology, understand technical specifications, and grasp complex systems.
mechanics: Repair, sabotage, and understand technology. Fix broken equipment or jury-rig solutions under pressure.
perception: Notice details others miss. Spot hidden enemies, track movement, and perceive danger.
persuasion: Convince others through charm and reason. Negotiate, inspire, and sway opinions in your favor.
pilot: Command vehicles, starships, and aircraft. Maneuver under fire, execute complex aerial tactics, and evade pursuit.
stealth: Move silently and hide in shadows. Avoid detection, sneak past guards, and vanish when needed.
survival: Navigate wilderness, find food and water, and predict weather. Build shelter and live off the land.
swim: Move through water with efficiency. Swim long distances, survive in currents, and dive deep.
treatInjury: Heal wounds, diagnose illness, and stabilize the dying. Your medical knowledge can save lives.
useComputer: Hack systems, bypass security, and manipulate data. Break into networks or defend digital fortresses.
useTheForce: Tap the Force for insight and power. Sense destinies, commune with the Force, and channel its energy.
